title: Preview Environments (GitHub + DigitalOcean)
description: Spin up a live preview environment for every pull request. Comment /start on a PR, get a running app in ~2 minutes.
requirements: SSH key added to both DigitalOcean and SuperPlane
A setup script at scripts/preview-setup.sh in your repo

title: Blue/Green Deploy (Render + Cloudflare)
description: Zero-downtime blue/green deployments with canary traffic routing and automated rollback on health check failure.
requirements: Cloudflare integration with DNS and Load Balancer access
At least two Render services (blue and green)

title: Incident Router (PagerDuty + Slack)
description: Route incidents by severity to the right on-call team. Auto-create Slack channels and post runbooks.
requirements: Slack integration with channel creation permissions

title: Health Check Monitor
description: Poll HTTP endpoints every 5 minutes. Alert on failures via Slack and create PagerDuty incidents after 3 consecutive misses.

title: GitHub Release Pipeline
description: Tag-driven release flow: run tests, build artifacts, create GitHub release, notify Slack on success or failure.

title: PR Auto-Labeler
description: Automatically label pull requests based on file paths, size, and author. Keep your repo organized without manual work.
requirements: GitHub integration with pull request permissions

title: Deploy Approval Gate
description: Require manual approval before production deploys. Slack notification to approvers with one-click approve/reject.

title: Docker Build & Push
description: Build Docker images on push to main, tag with git SHA, push to registry, and update deployment manifest.
requirements: Docker registry credentials as a secret

title: Scheduled DB Backup
description: Nightly database backups via SSH. Upload to S3 with retention policy. Alert on failure.
requirements: DigitalOcean integration or SSH access to DB host

title: SSL Certificate Monitor
description: Check SSL certificate expiry daily. Alert via Slack 30, 14, and 7 days before expiration.

title: Uptime Status Page
description: Monitor services and update a public status page. Auto-create incidents on downtime, resolve on recovery.

title: Slack Standup Bot
description: Collect daily standups via Slack at 9am. Summarize and post to a team channel. Track participation.
requirements: Slack integration with message and channel permissions

title: AWS Cost Alert
description: Monitor daily AWS spend. Alert when costs exceed threshold. Weekly summary report to Slack.

title: Feature Flag Rollout
description: Staged feature flag rollout: 1% -> 10% -> 50% -> 100% with automatic rollback on error rate spike.

title: Dependency Update Bot
description: Weekly scan for outdated dependencies. Auto-create PRs with updates. Notify team of security advisories.
requirements: GitHub integration with PR creation permissions

title: GitLab CI Pipeline
description: Mirror GitHub pushes to GitLab CI. Run tests, deploy on success, post results back to GitHub status checks.

title: Incident Postmortem Generator
description: Auto-collect incident timeline from PagerDuty and Slack. Generate postmortem doc in Google Docs.

title: Terraform Plan Review
description: Run terraform plan on PR, post diff as comment. Require approval for destructive changes before apply.
requirements: GitHub integration with PR comment permissions

title: Log Alert Pipeline (Datadog)
description: Monitor Datadog log patterns. Route alerts by severity to Slack channels and create tickets for critical errors.

title: Multi-Environment Promotion
description: Promote builds through staging -> UAT -> production with approval gates and smoke tests at each stage.
requirements: Access to staging, UAT, and production environments

title: Webhook Relay & Transform
description: Receive webhooks from any source, transform payloads, and fan out to multiple destinations with retry logic.
requirements: HTTP endpoints for webhook sources and destinations
